prompt: Studio product photograph of a heather grey heavyweight Champion-cut crewneck pullover hoodie laid casually flat on a warm grey concrete surface. The hoodie has a kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood, and the natural rumple of well-worn workwear. The garment is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO patches, NO embroidery, NO print, NO graphics, NO text anywhere on the front, sleeves, or hood — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Top-down 90-degree overhead view, soft daylight from upper-left, cool grey shadows, slightly desaturated palette. Working-contractor product catalog feel, behind-the-scenes documentary tone, NOT mall-fashion glossy, NOT HGTV bright. No tags visible, no people.
